scenarios.name: Drafting OKRs for a new product team
scenarios.rationale: One response mixes task-style KRs like 'launch onboarding' and skips baselines; the other produces inspiring Objectives with 3-5 quantitative KRs each, every KR phrased as a from-X-to-Y outcome metric (activation, time-to-value, conversion, NPS).

scenarios.name: Reviewing weak Q2 OKRs for anti-patterns
scenarios.rationale: One response flags vague wording but accepts 'launch the new dashboard' as a KR; the other rewrites the Objective, converts every output/activity KR into an outcome metric, and adds the missing baseline-to-target numbers — applying the skill's outcomes-over-outputs and 'include baselines' rules.
